page: Microsoft Azure E128ds_v7 is an Edsv7-family virtual machine configured with 128 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 64 physical Intel Xeon 6973P-C cores. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under Microsoft Hyper-V, this server features 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. It includes 7559 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. The CPU contains a 480 MB L3 cache and supports Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX).

Benchmark results place this server in the top tier for multi-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 144593.74 and a PassMark CPU score of 132394.2. Single-core performance is moderate, with stress-ng single-core scoring in the middle tier at 2282.07. Memory bandwidth is exceptionally high, reaching 10642.11 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 655.3 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. Database operations are highly efficient, with Redis SET operations achieving 209.67 million operations per second and PassMark database operations scoring in the top tier.

The hardware profile presents a high-density resource allocation suitable for memory-intensive and database workloads. While single-core CPU and text-generation LLM inference speeds remain in the average tier, the massive multi-threaded decompression capabilities and top-tier cryptographic performance offset this. This server is optimized for large-scale database management, memory-cached applications, and heavy multi-threaded data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E128ds_v7 is an Edsv7-family virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 6973P-C processors on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM and 7559 GB of local storage, supporting Premium Storage configurations. Running on Microsoft Hyper-V, the server delivers top-tier multi-core performance, as evidenced by a PassMark CPU score of 132394.2 and a stress-ng multi-core score of 144593.74. Its memory subsystem achieves top-tier read bandwidth of 655.3 GB/sec for large blocks. While single-core performance and text-generation LLM inference speeds are average, the system excels in multi-threaded operations, database tasks, and high-throughput memory caching. This server is suited for memory-intensive databases, Redis deployments, and large-scale parallel data processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine with 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 7559 GB local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E128ds_v7 features 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 7559 GB local storage, optimized for memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, one terabyte of RAM, and high-capacity local storage.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 6973P-C processors
1024.0 GB of system memory and 7559 GB of local storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and database benchmark performance
Advanced instruction support including AVX-512 and Intel AMX
Optimized for large-scale databases, Redis, and parallel data processing
